languages.text: "Артефакт. У нас с Нунциусом возникли разногласия — фрустрированный отсутствием прогресса, я хотел подойти к его исследованию радикально. Я хотел экспериментировать на себе. Нунциус был яростно против — утверждал, что это слишком безрассудно, вводных недостаточно, а результаты непредсказуемы. Конечно же, он был прав. В своем упрямстве и гордыне я не послушал его, вывел артефакт из стазис-сацеллума и потянулся к нему мехадендритом. Нунциус перехватил его и нечаянно коснулся артефакта. Этот момент терзает меня последние пятьдесят лет".

"The artefact. Nuncius and I had a disagreement — I was frustrated by the lack of progress, and I wanted to take a more radical approach to studying it. I wanted to experiment on myself. Nuncius was vehemently opposed — he argued that it was reckless, with insufficient data and unpredictable outcomes. Of course, he was right. In my stubbornness and arrogance, I did not heed him. I removed the artefact from the stasis sacellum and reached for it with a mechadendrite. Nuncius tried to intercept it and inadvertently touched the artefact. That moment has haunted me for the past fifty years."

languages.text: «El artefacto. Nuncius y yo no estábamos de acuerdo. A mí me frustraba nuestra falta de progreso y quería adoptar un enfoque más radical para el estudio. Quería experimentar conmigo mismo. Nuncius se oponía completamente al plan. Decía que era atolondrado, que no teníamos datos suficientes y el resultado era impredecible. Por supuesto, estaba en lo cierto. Lleno de arrogancia y testarudez, no le hice caso. Extraje el artefacto del sacelio de suspensión y alargué una mecadendrita hacia él. Nuncius trató de interponerse y, por error, tocó el artefacto. Llevo cincuenta años atormentado por ese momento».
languages.original_text: "The artefact. Nuncius and I had a disagreement — I was frustrated by the lack of progress, and I wanted to take a more radical approach to studying it. I wanted to experiment on myself. Nuncius was vehemently opposed — he argued that it was reckless, with insufficient data and unpredictable outcomes. Of course, he was right. In my stubbornness and arrogance, I did not heed him. I removed the artefact from the stasis sacellum and reached for it with a mechadendrite. Nuncius tried to intercept it and inadvertently touched the artefact. That moment has haunted me for the past fifty years."

traits.locale_text: «El artefacto. Nuncius y yo no estábamos de acuerdo. A mí me frustraba nuestra falta de progreso y quería adoptar un enfoque más radical para el estudio. Quería experimentar conmigo mismo. Nuncius se oponía completamente al plan. Decía que era atolondrado, que no teníamos datos suficientes y el resultado era impredecible. Por supuesto, estaba en lo cierto. Lleno de arrogancia y testarudez, no le hice caso. Extraje el artefacto del sacelio de suspensión y alargué una mecadendrita hacia él. Nuncius trató de interponerse y, por error, tocó el artefacto. Llevo cincuenta años atormentado por ese momento».

languages.text: “是那个造物。我和努恩修斯产生了分歧。当时研究毫无进展，我深感挫败，于是打算采取更激进的研究方法——我想拿自己做实验。努恩修斯极力反对，他争辩说数据不足且结果无法预测，这样的做法非常鲁莽。当然，他是对的。可我当时狂妄又固执，根本听不进去。我把造物从静滞神龛里取出，伸出一条机械触须去拿。努恩修斯试图阻止我，结果无意中碰到了那个造物。接下来的一瞬间，折磨了我五十年。”
languages.original_text: "The artefact. Nuncius and I had a disagreement — I was frustrated by the lack of progress, and I wanted to take a more radical approach to studying it. I wanted to experiment on myself. Nuncius was vehemently opposed — he argued that it was reckless, with insufficient data and unpredictable outcomes. Of course, he was right. In my stubbornness and arrogance, I did not heed him. I removed the artefact from the stasis sacellum and reached for it with a mechadendrite. Nuncius tried to intercept it and inadvertently touched the artefact. That moment has haunted me for the past fifty years."

traits.locale_text: “是那个造物。我和努恩修斯产生了分歧。当时研究毫无进展，我深感挫败，于是打算采取更激进的研究方法——我想拿自己做实验。努恩修斯极力反对，他争辩说数据不足且结果无法预测，这样的做法非常鲁莽。当然，他是对的。可我当时狂妄又固执，根本听不进去。我把造物从静滞神龛里取出，伸出一条机械触须去拿。努恩修斯试图阻止我，结果无意中碰到了那个造物。接下来的一瞬间，折磨了我五十年。”

languages.text: « C'était à cause de l'artefact. Nuncius et moi étions en désaccord sur la marche à suivre. Frustré par l'absence de progrès, je voulais adopter une approche plus radicale en menant des expériences sur moi-même. Nuncius s'y opposait formellement, arguant du danger que représentait cette méthode aux résultats imprévisibles du fait de nos données lacunaires. Évidemment, il avait raison, mais j'étais trop obstiné et arrogant pour l'écouter. J'ai retiré l'artefact du sacellum de stase et tenté de le saisir avec une mécadendrite. En voulant m'en empêcher, Nuncius a touché l'artefact par accident. Ce moment me hante depuis cinquante ans. »
languages.original_text: "The artefact. Nuncius and I had a disagreement — I was frustrated by the lack of progress, and I wanted to take a more radical approach to studying it. I wanted to experiment on myself. Nuncius was vehemently opposed — he argued that it was reckless, with insufficient data and unpredictable outcomes. Of course, he was right. In my stubbornness and arrogance, I did not heed him. I removed the artefact from the stasis sacellum and reached for it with a mechadendrite. Nuncius tried to intercept it and inadvertently touched the artefact. That moment has haunted me for the past fifty years."

En voulant m'en empêcher, Nuncius a touché l'artefact par accident. Ce moment me hante depuis cinquante ans. »

languages.text: "Eser. Nuncius'la bir anlaşmazlık yaşadık. İlerleme kaydedememekten bıkmıştım ve eseri incelemek için daha radikal bir yaklaşım benimsemek istiyordum. Kendi üzerimde deney yapmak istedim. Nuncius şiddetle karşı çıktı, yetersiz veri ve öngörülemeyen sonuçlarla bunun pervasızlık olduğunu savundu. Tabii ki haklıydı. İnatçılığımla ve kibrimle onu dinlemedim. Eseri staz şapelinden çıkardım ve bir mekadentritle ona uzandım. Nuncius buna engel olmaya çalıştı, yanlışlıkla esere dokundu. O an, son elli yıldır aklımdan çıkmadı."
languages.original_text: "The artefact. Nuncius and I had a disagreement — I was frustrated by the lack of progress, and I wanted to take a more radical approach to studying it. I wanted to experiment on myself. Nuncius was vehemently opposed — he argued that it was reckless, with insufficient data and unpredictable outcomes. Of course, he was right. In my stubbornness and arrogance, I did not heed him. I removed the artefact from the stasis sacellum and reached for it with a mechadendrite. Nuncius tried to intercept it and inadvertently touched the artefact. That moment has haunted me for the past fifty years."

İnatçılığımla ve kibrimle onu dinlemedim. Eseri staz şapelinden çıkardım ve bir mekadentritle ona uzandım. Nuncius buna engel olmaya çalıştı, yanlışlıkla esere dokundu. O an, son elli yıldır aklımdan çıkmadı."

languages.text: "Das Artefakt. Nuncius und ich waren uneinig ... ich war von unseren fehlenden Fortschritten frustriert und wollte hinsichtlich unserer Arbeit einen radikaleren Ansatz verfolgen. Ich wollte an mir selbst experimentieren. Nuncius war hingegen strikt dagegen ... er hielt es angesichts der unzureichenden Daten und ungewissen Ergebnisse für leichtsinnig. Er hatte natürlich recht. Allerdings hörte ich in meiner Sturheit und Arroganz nicht auf ihn. Ich holte das Artefakt aus dem Stascen-Sacellum und griff mit einem Mechadendriten danach. Als mich Nuncius davon abhalten wollte, berührte er versehentlich das Artefakt. Dieser Moment verfolgt mich seit fünfzig Jahren."
languages.original_text: "The artefact. Nuncius and I had a disagreement — I was frustrated by the lack of progress, and I wanted to take a more radical approach to studying it. I wanted to experiment on myself. Nuncius was vehemently opposed — he argued that it was reckless, with insufficient data and unpredictable outcomes. Of course, he was right. In my stubbornness and arrogance, I did not heed him. I removed the artefact from the stasis sacellum and reached for it with a mechadendrite. Nuncius tried to intercept it and inadvertently touched the artefact. That moment has haunted me for the past fifty years."

languages.text: 「アーティファクトヌンシウスと私は意見の相違があった。私は進歩のなさに苛立ち、もっと根本的なアプローチで研究したいと思った。私は自分自身を実験台にしたかった。ヌンシウスは猛反対した。データも不十分で、結果も予測できない無謀なことだと主張したのだ。もちろん、彼は正しかった。頑固で傲慢な私は、彼の言うことを聞かなかった。私はアーティファクトをカプセルから取り出し、メカデンドライトでそれに手を伸ばした。ヌンシウスはそれを阻止しようとして、うっかりアーティファクトに触れてしまった。その瞬間が、この50年間、私を悩ませてきた」。
languages.original_text: "The artefact. Nuncius and I had a disagreement — I was frustrated by the lack of progress, and I wanted to take a more radical approach to studying it. I wanted to experiment on myself. Nuncius was vehemently opposed — he argued that it was reckless, with insufficient data and unpredictable outcomes. Of course, he was right. In my stubbornness and arrogance, I did not heed him. I removed the artefact from the stasis sacellum and reached for it with a mechadendrite. Nuncius tried to intercept it and inadvertently touched the artefact. That moment has haunted me for the past fifty years."
